/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fersa.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/fersa.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fersa.dir/GameLogic.cpp.o -o fersa  ../core/Window/libwindow.a ../core/Input/libinput.a ../core/Game/libgame.a /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLEW.so /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 ../core/Logic/liblogic.a
